---
title: "Open-Source UAV"
id: material-introduction-2
order: 42
summary: "David Benowitz gives an overview of the major commercial Open Source UAV systems."
source_url: "https://droneanalyst.com/2021/05/30/rise-of-open-source-drones"
modules:
  - module-introduction
  - module-hs
Goals:
  - module-goals
  - module-goals-hs
activities: []
assessments:
  - assessment
  - assessment-hs
labels:
  - supplement
  - optional
published: true

---

## Read the article:

[The Rise of Open-Source Drones](https://droneanalyst.com/2021/05/30/rise-of-open-source-drones)

---

[**Module:** UAV based remote Sensing - A Brief Overview](../modules/module-introduction.qmd)
